    10→  var style=state.settings.answerLabelStyle||'arabic';
    11→  switch(style){
    12→    case 'numbers': return (index+1)+'';
    13→    case 'english': return String.fromCharCode(65+index);
    14→    case 'custom':
    15→      var labels=(state.settings.customLabels||'').split(/[,،\s]+/).filter(Boolean);
    16→      return labels[index]||ARABIC_LETTERS[index]||(index+1)+'';
    17→    case 'arabic':
    18→    default: return ARABIC_LETTERS[index]||(index+1)+'';
    19→  }
    20→}

    65→/* Apply theme CSS variables from THEMES[] single source of truth.
    66→   Sets inline style CSS custom properties so JS-driven theme changes
    67→   update every var without duplicating colour values. */
    68→function applyThemeCSS(themeId){
    69→  const theme=THEMES.find(t=>t.id===themeId);
    70→  if(!theme||!theme.vars)return;
    71→  const root=document.documentElement;
    72→  root.setAttribute('data-theme',themeId);
    73→  /* Set every variable from theme.vars — THEMES[] is the single source of truth */
    74→  Object.entries(theme.vars).forEach(([k,v])=>{
    75→    root.style.setProperty('--'+k,v);
    76→  });
    77→  /* Shared structural properties — fallback to space defaults if not defined */
    78→  const sharedDefaults={'radius':'16px','radius-sm':'8px','header-h':'64px','ll-scale':'1','cat-card-scale':'1'};
    79→  Object.entries(sharedDefaults).forEach(([k,v])=>{
    80→    if(!(k in theme.vars)) root.style.setProperty('--'+k,v);
    81→  });
    82→}
